title: You Parents Hear What Jesus Taught
abc_source:
X: 304
T: You Parents Hear What Jesus Taught
%%combinevoices 1
C: Words: Ludwig Helmbold (1532-1598). Translated by William M. Czamanske, 1939.  
C: Music: 'Herr Jesu Christ, Dict Zu Uns Wend' from Cantionale Germanicum, Dresden, 1628. 
C: Setting: "Mehrstimmiges ChoralBuch", 1906.
C: copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2006 Revision.
S: Note that Concordia Publishing House, the original publisher of this translation
S: (in "The Lutheran Hymnal", 1941), published "Lutheran Worship" in 1982. This translation is not present in 
S: the copyright notices, indicating that it had been released into the public domain.  
S: Music source: "Mehrstimmiges ChoralBuch", 1906 Hymn #74, pdf page 69 Ed. Karl Brauer.

metadata.composer: 'Herr Jesu Christ, Dict Zu Uns Wend' from Cantionale Germanicum, Dresden, 1628 "Mehrstimmiges ChoralBuch", 1906
metadata.lyricist: Ludwig Helmbold (1532-1598). Translated by William M. Czamanske, 1939

c_lines: Words: Ludwig Helmbold (1532-1598). Translated by William M. Czamanske, 1939.
Music: 'Herr Jesu Christ, Dict Zu Uns Wend' from Cantionale Germanicum, Dresden, 1628.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2006 Revision.

1.raw_text: You parents, hear what Jesus taught When little ones to him were brought: Forbid them not, but heed my plea Permitting them to come to me.

2.raw_text: Obey your Lord and let his truth Be taught your children in their youth That they in church and school may dwell And learn their Savior's praise to tell.

3.raw_text: For if you love them as you ought, To Christ your children will be brought. If thus you place them in his care, All in your family well shall fare.
